home_hero_subline: CrismaTest delivers AI-powered candidate assessments with fraud detection built in. Know who you're hiring — before you extend an offer.
home_what_is_body: CrismaTest combines multi-format assessments, AI-powered scoring, and built-in fraud detection into a single platform. Evaluate candidates objectively, compare results side by side, and make hiring decisions you can stand behind.
home_how_headline: Three steps to your next hire
home_how_step_1_desc: Choose from 40+ templates or create a custom assessment. Mix question formats — multiple choice, open-ended, video, coding, and more.
home_how_step_2_desc: Send a unique test link to candidates. They complete it at their own pace, and our fraud detection monitors every session automatically.
home_how_step_3_desc: Review AI-generated CrismaScores, watch flagged sessions, and compare candidates side by side to find your best fit.
home_companies_feat_1_desc: Combine multiple choice, open-ended, video, coding, and file-upload questions in a single test.
home_companies_feat_2_desc: Every response is analyzed and scored automatically, giving you an objective CrismaScore for each candidate.
home_companies_feat_3_desc: Webcam monitoring, browser lock detection, and AI anomaly scoring flag suspicious behavior in real time.
home_companies_feat_4_desc: Deliver assessments in English or French — candidates choose their preferred language at test start.
home_companies_feat_5_desc: Rank and compare all applicants by CrismaScore in a single dashboard view.
home_companies_feat_6_desc: Invite hiring managers and reviewers to leave notes and ratings without sharing raw candidate data.
home_antifraid_body: Every CrismaTest session is monitored for suspicious behavior from start to finish. Our AI flags anomalies so your team can make informed decisions — not just trust the honor system.
home_tests_subtitle: Browse our library of ready-to-use templates or customize them to match your job requirements.
home_testimonial_1_quote: CrismaTest cut our screening time in half. The fraud detection feature alone gave us confidence we weren't wasting interview slots on candidates who gamed the system. Our offer acceptance rate has never been higher.
home_testimonial_2_quote: The bilingual support was a game-changer for us. We hire across France and Belgium, and candidates can now test in their preferred language without any extra setup on our end. The CrismaScore makes comparing across regions straightforward.
home_testimonial_3_quote: We evaluated three platforms before choosing CrismaTest. The combination of assessment quality, AI scoring, and the integrity monitoring put it in a class of its own. Our hiring managers trust the scores and the process.
home_faq_a1: CrismaTest offers flexible plans starting with a free tier for small teams. Paid plans scale with the number of assessments and seats you need. Contact us for a personalized quote tailored to your team size and hiring volume.
home_faq_q2: How long does it take to set up a test?
home_faq_a2: Most teams launch their first test in under 15 minutes using one of our ready-made templates. Customizing questions, branding, and scoring criteria can be done through our visual builder — no technical setup required.
home_faq_q3: How effective is the fraud detection?
home_faq_a3: Our multi-layer fraud detection combines webcam monitoring, browser behavior analysis, timing anomalies, and AI pattern recognition. Flagged sessions include a detailed report so your team can review the evidence and make the final call.
home_faq_q4: How accurate is the AI scoring?
home_faq_a4: AI scoring is calibrated against validated answer rubrics and continuously improved. For open-ended questions, scores reflect relevance, structure, and completeness. Human reviewers can always override or annotate scores to maintain quality.
home_faq_a5: Candidate data is encrypted in transit and at rest. We are GDPR-compliant and retain data only for as long as needed. Candidates can request deletion of their data at any time, and you control retention settings for your account.
home_faq_q6: Does CrismaTest integrate with ATS platforms?
home_faq_a6: CrismaTest integrates with major ATS platforms via webhook and API. We also offer native integrations with Workday, Greenhouse, and Lever. Our team can assist with custom integrations during onboarding.
home_faq_q7: What is the candidate experience like?
home_faq_a7: Candidates receive a clean, mobile-friendly test interface with clear instructions and progress indicators. Tests are designed to feel fair and professional. Average completion time is under 45 minutes, and candidates receive a confirmation email when they submit.
contact_form_subtitle: Tell us about your team and we'll show you how CrismaTest can transform your hiring process.
